# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "metadata": {
    "warning": "ARM templates cannot create Azure AD service principals or app registrations. Service principals must be created via Microsoft Graph, Azure CLI, PowerShell, Terraform with AzureAD provider, or another identity management tool. This template assigns least-privilege roles to an existing service principal."
  },
  "parameters": {
    "servicePrincipalObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of an existing service principal in Microsoft Entra ID."
      }
    },
    "roleDefinitionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Built-in role definition ID to assign. Default is Contributor. Consider using a more scoped custom or built-in role instead of subscription-wide Contributor."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "subscriptionScope": "[subscription().id]",
    "roleAssignmentName": "[guid(subscription().id, parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId'), parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2022-04-01",
      "name": "[variables('roleAssignmentName')]",
      "scope": "[variables('subscriptionScope')]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]",
        "principalId": "[parameters('servicePrincipalObjectId')]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "assignedScope": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('subscriptionScope')]"
    },
    "assignedRoleDefinitionId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]"
    }
  }
}
